# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A Helm chart for deploying my app
version: 0.1.0

dependencies:
  - name: common
    version: 1.x.x
    repository: "https://example.com/charts"

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: my-app
    spec:
      replicas: 3
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-app
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: my-app
        spec:
          containers:
          - name: my-app-container
            image: "my-app-image:latest"
            ports:
            - containerPort: 80

values.yaml:
  replicaCount: 3
